headline: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
summary: New York enacted a statewide moratorium on new hyperscale data centers. Governor Hochul signed the order, blocking new environmental permits for up to a year. A bill that could restrict more developments still awaits signature.

headline: Microsoft tests Windows Search without all the ads and fluff
summary: Microsoft is testing a cleaner version of the Windows 11 search menu. It strips recommended content and ads for Windows Insiders. This move aims to regain user trust and improve the Windows experience.

headline: OnePlus is reportedly bailing on the US
summary: OnePlus and its parent company, Oppo, are reportedly planning to exit the US and European markets. This move follows months of speculation about the brand's future. An official announcement is expected in the coming days.

headline: A two-pack of DJI's most capable wireless mics just got its first price cut
summary: DJI Mic 3 wireless lavalier microphones are now available at a discounted price. The two-pack bundle offers significantly improved audio quality for smartphone videos. This marks the first price cut for the capable wireless mic set.

headline: Anya Taylor-Joy to Read Lord of the Rings Books for 'The Hunt for Gollum' Role
summary: Anya Taylor-Joy will read 'Lord of the Rings' books for her role in 'The Hunt for Gollum'. Her 'lethal elf' character is not found in J. R. R. Tolkien's original texts. This suggests the film will introduce new lore elements.

headline: Ubisoft Lays Off Assassin's Creed Black Flag Devs Amid Game's Success
summary: Ubisoft Barcelona developers who contributed to 'Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced' are facing layoffs. This decision comes despite the game selling 2 million copies within 24 hours. The layoffs highlight concerns about developer treatment amid commercial success.

headline: Mike Flanagan's Carrie TV Show to Deviate Significantly from Stephen King Novel
summary: Mike Flanagan's upcoming 'Carrie' TV series will make significant changes from Stephen King's novel. Flanagan stated it was 'never going to be a straight adaptation'. First details and images for the Prime Video show have been released.

headline: Save $50 Off the AirPods Pro 3 Noise Canceling Earbuds
summary: You can now save $50 on the AirPods Pro 3 noise-canceling earbuds. These premium earbuds are often recommended as the best choice for iPhone users. This deal presents an opportunity to upgrade your audio experience.

headline: Ann Widdecombe Suspect Not Known to Prevent; Counter Terrorism Police Investigate
summary: The suspect involved in the Ann Widdecombe incident was not known to the government's Prevent anti-terrorism program. Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood confirmed this in an update to MPs. Counter-terrorism police have taken over the investigation.

headline: Widdecombe's Death Renews Debate Over Politician Protection
summary: Ann Widdecombe's death has reignited the debate surrounding the protection of politicians. Many MPs argue that social media normalizes violent language and abuse. The BBC's political editor highlights the renewed discussions.

headline: UK Heatwave Continues; No Significant Rain Forecast for a Week
summary: The UK heatwave is set to continue, with no significant rain forecast for at least a week. The summer has been marked by a significant lack of wet weather across the country. Ben Rich provides an explanation of the ongoing dry spell.

headline: Wife Recounts Ordeal of Husband Nearly Sucked Out of Ryanair Plane
summary: Svetlana Grković shared the terrifying ordeal of her husband nearly being sucked out of a Ryanair plane. She stated her husband is 'seriously injured and in shock' after the incident. Grković recounted their desperate vow: 'If we die, we die together'.
